case_title: SARAVIA, AGGEO VS BELL, DANIEL EDWARD

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO DANIEL E. BELL RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SARAVIA, AGGEO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BELL, DANIEL EDWARD $2,240.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,260.00, DEFEND. WAS 70% NEGLIGENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
